message:
fix(gateway): Improve xf route type validation and rch availability check

**XF route type validation (apps/gateway/src/routes/xf.ts)**
- Add explicit type validation for search types parameter
- Filter incoming types against validTypes Set before type casting
- Prevents invalid type strings from propagating through the system
- Valid types: tweet, like, dm, grok, all

**RCH service availability check (apps/gateway/src/services/rch.service.ts)**
- Simplify isRchAvailable() to rely solely on exit code
- Remove fragile stdout content check (was checking for "v" in output)
- Exit code 0 is the authoritative signal for rch availability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
